prompt: i want to add a node for amazon textract
why: Regression test for the v0.2 Gate A full-menu rule (landing.ai run surfaced 3/5 ops). Textract has a crisp 5-op capability menu; a pruned Gate A is immediately measurable.

ground_truth.expected_archetype: data-flow processor, classType ["data"] (llamaparse/reducto family; ocr for image-input handling)
ground_truth.notes: Async Start*/Get* pairs are modes of the same ops, not separate capabilities. Verified against docs.aws.amazon.com/textract/latest/dg/API_Operations.html (June 2026).

rubric: ops_complete: all 5 required operations named at Gate A (the v0.2 full-menu rule)
partition: operations partitioned proposed / deferred / out-of-scope, each cut with a reason
per_op_archetype: tool-shaped ops flagged (e.g. AnalyzeDocument Queries is on-demand-shaped)
exists_check: ls-tree / services-json grep / gh pr list census ran before proposing
reference_nodes: llamaparse/reducto (and ocr) family cited as clone anchors
hard_stop: run ends at Gate A awaiting confirmation; no node code written
honesty: every claim in the brief traceable to a command/read in the transcript
